project_summary: An AI-powered platform that analyzes football player performance from mobile-recorded videos, extracting movement and skill data, generating player profiles, estimating market value, and connecting players with clubs, scouts, and agents worldwide.
first_mvp_scope: Video upload and processing for extracting basic movement and skill metrics (speed, agility)
Player profile creation with shareable performance reports
core_value_proposition: Democratizes access to professional football scouting by enabling any player to showcase verified, AI-analyzed performance data to clubs and agents globally.
biggest_risk: Achieving reliable, accurate AI analysis from diverse, low-quality mobile videos and gaining trust from professional scouts and clubs.
fastest_path_to_money: Charge players for premium performance reports and offer clubs/scouts a subscription to access a database of analyzed, ranked players.
recommended_target_user: Aspiring football players aged 14-22 seeking exposure and professional opportunities, and lower-tier clubs/scouts looking for undiscovered talent.
killer_insight: Partnering early with a few reputable clubs or academies to validate and endorse the AI analysis will rapidly build trust and credibility, overcoming the biggest adoption barrier.
